extraction.one_line_summary: SENECHAL Florian won after JAKOBSEN Fabio suffered a mechanical inside 2km, Deceuninck's lead-out speed so high they won without their designated sprinter.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck lead-out speed from 3km was so extreme it dropped their own sprinter JAKOBSEN yet still secured victory.
BERNAL Egan and overall contenders lost 6+ seconds by missing the Deceuninck acceleration before final 2km, revealing positioning vulnerability.
KNOX James as domestique setting flat-stage pace for GC team signals Deceuninck prioritizes positioning control over sprint train conservation.

rider_signals.SÉNÉCHAL Florian: positive: converted domestique role into opportunistic sprint win when lead-out speed dropped designated sprinter JAKOBSEN
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: mechanical inside 2km after team executed perfect lead-out reveals equipment vulnerability at critical moments
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: caught behind split at 6 seconds, failed to follow Deceuninck acceleration showing poor flat-stage positioning instincts
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: positioned third wheel behind Deceuninck train without teammates, showing individual sprint positioning skill
